title: Block’s 4,000 Job Cuts Raise Questions Over AI’s Role in Layoffs
description: When Block Inc. laid off nearly half its staff this week, co-founder Jack Dorsey offered a seemingly simple explanation: artificial intelligence was allowing the company to do more with fewer employees.
content:
When Block Inc. laid off nearly half its staff this week, co-founder Jack Dorsey offered a seemingly simple explanation: artificial intelligence was allowing the company to do more with fewer employees.

title: Rebuilding faces and identifying tattoos, AI joins the search for the missing in Mexico
description: By Karen Esquivel, CNN en Español (CNN) — In 2021, Héctor Daniel Flores Hernández was reported missing. Two years later, his father, Héctor Flores, saw his son’s image speak again. In a video generated through artificial intelligence technology, which digitally animated a still image and gave it a synthesized voice, the figure of Héctor Daniel

title: Red and blue states alike want to limit AI in insurance. Trump wants to limit the states
description: Regulating artificial intelligence is becoming a politically divisive topic.
content:
